hero.badge: A trustworthy AI knowledge assistant for creators and learners
hero.title: Knowledge Base Agent
hero.titleMuted: Make your knowledge searchable, conversational, and verifiable
hero.description: Consolidate your documents and notes, then use semantic retrieval with cited answers to turn hard-to-find knowledge into instant responses.
hero.loginNow: Already have an account? Log in

capabilities.label: Core capabilities
capabilities.title: Designed for solo creators and small teams

docs.title: Unified document ingestion
docs.description: Ingest PDF, Markdown, plain text, and more into one workspace for centralized knowledge management.

search.title: Semantic retrieval
search.description: Find relevant content by meaning instead of exact keywords to reduce missed context.

traceable.title: Traceable answers
traceable.description: Agent responses include source snippets so outputs are auditable and easier to trust.

workflow.title: Build your knowledge agent in 3 steps

step1.title: Create a knowledge base
step1.description: Organize your content by topic with clear structure.

step2.title: Import documents
step2.description: Uploaded files are vectorized automatically to become retrievable context.

step3.title: Start asking
step3.description: Get fast answers with references through agent chat.

cta.title: Ready to build your own knowledge assistant?
cta.description: From document organization to citation-backed answers, complete the full loop in one interface.

hero.title: About KnowledgeAgent
hero.description: KnowledgeAgent is dedicated to making enterprise knowledge searchable, conversational, and verifiable. We transform document assets into continuously evolving knowledge systems, helping teams quickly find accurate answers in daily collaboration.

trusted.title: Trusted answers first
trusted.description: Every answer traces back to source documents, reducing hallucination risk.

knowledge.title: Continuous knowledge building
knowledge.description: Manage documents through a knowledge base system to build maintainable organizational memory.

semantic.title: Semantic retrieval driven
semantic.description: Locate relevant content beyond keyword limitations, improving query efficiency and accuracy.
